title: Xyetta
description: A kitchen-sink, Vanilla+ modpack designed to enhance Minecraft in every way!
body:
# Xyetta
Xyetta is a **Kitchen Sink**, **Vanilla+** modpack designed to enhance Minecraft in every way!

Xyetta has all your favourite mods like **Terralith**, **Replay Mod**, and more.

Create breathtaking worlds with Xyetta's world generation mods for all dimensions while preserving the feel of Minecraft.
